title: afrolimon capense
intro: Afrolimon capense, also known as the "Cape Lemon Balm", is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Afrolimon capense include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from headaches and fever. The herbal preparations of Afrolimon capense include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
